title: Semiglobal oblique projection exponential dynamical observers for   nonautonomous semilinear parabolic-like equations
comment:
6 figures. In this version some equation tags are added, which were
  missing in first version due to a mistake in the latex source file. That
  mistake made the first version hard to read/follow
summary:
The estimation of the full state of a nonautonomous semilinear parabolic
equation is achieved by a Luenberger type dynamical observer. The estimation is
derived from an output given by a finite number of average measurements of the
state on small regions. The state estimate given by the observer converges
exponentially to the real state, as time increases. The result is semiglobal in
the sense that the error dynamics can be made stable for an arbitrary given
initial condition, provided a large enough number of measurements, depending on
the norm of the initial condition, is taken. The output injection operator is
explicit and involves a suitable oblique projection. The results of numerical
simulations are presented showing the exponential stability of the error
dynamics.

AI.tldr: 针对非自治半线性抛物方程，提出基于有限个区域平均测量的Luenberger型观测器设计方法，实现状态估计的指数收敛。
AI.motivation: 研究非自治半线性抛物方程的状态估计问题，在仅能通过有限个小区域上的平均测量值获取部分状态信息的情况下，设计有效的观测器来重构完整状态。
AI.techniques: 采用Luenberger型动态观测器设计，利用合适的斜投影构造显式的输出注入算子，通过有限维逼近和稳定性分析建立误差动态的指数稳定性。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了观测器给出的状态估计随时间指数收敛到真实状态，结果是半全局的：对于任意给定的初始条件，只要测量数量足够大（依赖于初始条件的范数），就能使误差动态稳定。
AI.significance: 为无限维非自治系统的状态估计提供了理论框架，将有限维观测器设计推广到抛物型偏微分方程，在控制理论和工程应用中具有重要价值。

title: Fourier methods for fractional-order operators
comment:
20 pages. Prepared for the Proceedings of the RIMS Symposium
  "Harmonic Analysis and Nonlinear Partial Differential equations", July 11-13,
  2022, in the RIMS Kokyuroku Bessatsu series. Final version awaiting
  publication process
summary:
This is a survey on the use of Fourier transformation methods in the
treatment of boundary problems for the fractional Laplacian $(-\Delta)^a$
(0<a<1), and pseudodifferential generalizations P, over a bounded open set
$\Omega$ in $R^n$. The presentation starts at an elementary level. Two points
are explained in detail: 1) How the factor $d^a$, with $d(x)=dist(x,d\Omega)$,
comes into the picture, related to the fact that the precise solution spaces
for the homogeneous Dirichlet problem are so-called a-transmission spaces. 2)
The natural definition of a local nonhomogeneous Dirichlet condition
$\gamma_0(u/d^{a-1})=\varphi$. We also give brief accounts of some further
developments: Evolution problems (for $d_t u - r^+Pu = f(x,t)$) and resolvent
problems (for $Pu-\lambda u=f$), also with nonzero boundary conditions.
Integration by parts, Green's formula.

AI.tldr: 关于分数阶拉普拉斯算子边界问题中傅里叶变换方法应用的综述，重点解释了距离函数d^a因子和a-传输空间的作用。
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶拉普拉斯算子(-Δ)^a (0<a<1)及其伪微分推广在有界开集Ω⊂R^n上的边界问题，需要发展系统的傅里叶变换方法来处理这类非局部算子的边界条件。
AI.techniques: 傅里叶变换方法、a-传输空间理论、距离函数d(x)=dist(x,∂Ω)的幂次分析、局部非齐次Dirichlet条件定义、分部积分和格林公式在非局部算子中的推广。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 解释了因子d^a如何自然出现，与齐次Dirichlet问题的精确解空间（a-传输空间）相关；2) 给出了局部非齐次Dirichlet条件γ₀(u/d^{a-1})=φ的自然定义；3) 简要讨论了演化问题和预解问题。
AI.significance: 为分数阶拉普拉斯算子的边界问题提供了系统的傅里叶变换框架，建立了非局部算子边界条件的严格数学理论，对偏微分方程理论和应用数学有重要意义。

title: Stabilization of 2D Navier-Stokes equations by means of actuators with   locally supported vorticity
summary:
Exponential stabilization to time-dependent trajectories for the
incompressible Navier-Stokes equations is achieved with explicit feedback
controls. The fluid is contained in two-dimensional spatial domains and the
control force is, at each time instant, a linear combination of a finite number
of given actuators. Each actuator has its vorticity supported in a small
subdomain. The velocity field is subject to Lions boundary conditions.
Simulations are presented showing the stabilizing performance of the proposed
feedback. The results also apply to a class of observer design problems.

AI.tldr: 针对二维不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程，提出显式反馈控制方法实现时间依赖轨迹的指数稳定化
AI.motivation: 研究Navier-Stokes方程的反馈控制问题，目标是通过有限个执行器实现流体系统对时间依赖轨迹的指数稳定，解决流体控制中的稳定化难题
AI.techniques: 使用显式反馈控制设计、有限维执行器组合、小区域涡量支撑的作动器、Lions边界条件处理
AI.main_theorems: 证明了二维不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在有限个执行器控制下能够实现时间依赖轨迹的指数稳定，结果可推广到观测器设计问题
AI.significance: 为Navier-Stokes方程的反馈控制提供了理论框架，具有实际应用价值，特别是在流体控制和观测器设计领域

title: Nonexistence of solutions to parabolic problems with a potential on   weighted graphs
summary:
We investigate nonexistence of nontrivial nonnegative solutions to a class of
semilinear parabolic equations with a positive potential, posed on weighted
graphs. Assuming an upper bound on the Laplacian of the distance and a suitable
weighted space-time volume growth condition, we show that no global solutions
exists. We also discuss the optimality of the hypotheses, thus recovering a
critical exponent phenomenon of Fujita type.

AI.tldr: 在加权图上研究带正势能的半线性抛物方程非负非平凡解的不存在性，建立了Fujita型临界指数现象
AI.motivation: 研究加权图上半线性抛物方程解的存在性问题，特别是带正势能的情况，旨在建立类似于连续空间中Fujita现象的临界指数理论
AI.techniques: 利用距离函数的Laplacian上界条件、加权时空体积增长条件，采用比较原理和能量方法，讨论假设条件的最优性
AI.main_theorems: 在适当的距离Laplacian上界和加权时空体积增长条件下，证明了加权图上半线性抛物方程不存在全局非负非平凡解，并建立了Fujita型临界指数现象
AI.significance: 将连续空间中的Fujita临界指数理论推广到离散的加权图设置，为图上的抛物方程理论提供了新的存在性判据，连接了离散与连续分析

title: Minimal submanifolds with multiple isolated singularities
comment:
55 pages. Revised: This version completes the generalization of
  Smale's singular bridge principle to high codimension. The bridge
  constructions and many proofs have been simplified, and the introduction and
  closing remarks have been expanded. Comments welcome!
summary:
We extend Smale's singular bridge principle [Ann. of Math. 130 (1989),
603-642] for $n$-dimensional strictly stable minimal cones in
$\mathbb{R}^{n+1}$ $(n \geq 7$) to arbitrary codimension and each $n \geq 3$.
We then apply the procedure to copies of the Lawson-Osserman cone to produce a
four dimensional minimal graph in $\mathbb{R}^7$ with any finite number of
isolated singularities.

AI.tldr: 将Smale的奇异桥原理从余维1推广到任意余维，并应用于Lawson-Osserman锥构造具有任意有限孤立奇点的四维极小图
AI.motivation: Smale在1989年提出了奇异桥原理，用于构造余维1的极小曲面，但仅限于n≥7且锥严格稳定的情况。本文旨在将该原理推广到任意余维和更低的维度(n≥3)，并应用于具体的Lawson-Osserman锥构造奇异极小图。
AI.techniques: 奇异桥原理的推广、极小锥理论、Lawson-Osserman锥的几何性质、奇异点构造技术、余维推广的几何分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 将Smale奇异桥原理推广到任意余维和n≥3的情况；2. 应用该原理于Lawson-Osserman锥，构造出四维极小图在R^7中具有任意有限孤立奇点
AI.significance: 扩展了奇异桥原理的应用范围，为构造高余维奇异极小曲面提供了新工具，特别在Lawson-Osserman锥的应用展示了该方法的有效性，对几何测度论和极小曲面理论有重要意义

title: Scattering for defocusing cubic NLS under locally damped strong trapping
summary:
We are interested in the scattering problem for the cubic 3D nonlinear
defocusing Schr\"odinger equation with variable coefficients. Previous
scattering results for such problems address only the cases with constant
coefficients or assume strong variants of the non-trapping condition, stating
that all the trajectories of the Hamiltonian flow associated with the operator
are escaping to infinity. In contrast, we consider the most general setting,
where strong trapping, such as stable closed geodesics, may occur, but we
introduce a compactly supported damping term localized in the trapping region,
to explore how damping can mitigate the effects of trapping. In addition to the
challenges posed by the trapped trajectories, notably the loss of smoothing and
of scale-invariant Strichartz estimates, difficulties arise from the damping
itself, particularly since the energy is not, a priori, bounded. For
$H^{1+\epsilon}$ initial data -- chosen because the local-in-time theory is a
priori no better than for 3D unbounded manifolds, where local well-posedness of
strong $H^1$ solutions is unavailable -- we establish global existence and
scattering in $H^{s}$ for any $0 \leq s <1$ in positive times, the inability to
reach $H^1$ being related to the loss of smoothing due to trapping.

AI.tldr: 在具有强捕获（如稳定闭测地线）的变系数三维立方非线性散焦薛定谔方程中，通过引入紧支集阻尼项，证明了全局存在性和正向时间散射。
AI.motivation: 研究变系数三维立方非线性散焦薛定谔方程的散射问题。先前结果仅限于常系数或强非捕获条件，而本文考虑最一般情形：允许强捕获（如稳定闭测地线）存在，但引入紧支集阻尼项来缓解捕获效应的影响。
AI.techniques: 引入紧支集阻尼项处理捕获区域；处理捕获轨迹导致的平滑性损失和尺度不变Strichartz估计缺失；克服阻尼项带来的能量无界困难；使用H^{1+ε}初值数据（因为局部理论不优于三维无界流形情形）。
AI.main_theorems: 对于H^{1+ε}初值数据，建立了正向时间的全局存在性和H^{s}散射（0≤s<1），无法达到H^1与捕获导致的平滑性损失有关。
AI.significance: 首次在允许强捕获的变系数薛定谔方程中建立散射理论，展示了阻尼如何缓解捕获效应，为处理更一般的几何和系数情形提供了新方法。

title: 1D pressureless gas dynamics systems in a strip
summary:
We construct explicit measure-valued solutions to the one-dimensional
pressureless gas dynamics system in a strip-like domain by introducing a new
boundary potential. The constructed solutions satisfy an entropy condition, and
depending on the boundary data and the behavior of the potentials, mass
accumulation can occur at the boundaries. The approach relies on a systematic
treatment of boundary potentials and their interactions with the initial data,
providing a more precise understanding of the formation and propagation of
singularities in measure-valued solutions.

AI.tldr: 通过引入新的边界势能构造一维无压气体动力学系统在带状区域中的显式测度值解，并研究边界处的质量积累现象。
AI.motivation: 研究一维无压气体动力学系统在带状区域中的测度值解，特别关注边界效应对解的影响。该问题源于对无压气体动力学中奇异性形成和传播的深入理解需求，尤其是在有界区域中边界条件如何影响解的长期行为。
AI.techniques: 引入新的边界势能方法，系统处理边界势能与初始数据的相互作用，构造显式测度值解，并应用熵条件来确保解的物理合理性。
AI.main_theorems: 构造了满足熵条件的一维无压气体动力学系统在带状区域中的显式测度值解，证明了边界数据和势能行为可以导致边界处的质量积累现象。
AI.significance: 提供了对测度值解中奇异性形成和传播的更精确理解，特别是边界效应在无压气体动力学中的作用，为处理有界区域中的退化双曲系统提供了新方法。

title: Uniform Boundedness of Homogeneous Incompressible Flows in   $\mathbb{R}^3$
summary:
This paper investigates the extendability of local solutions for
incompressible 3D Navier-Stokes and 3D Euler problems, with initial data
$\mathbf{u}_0$ in the Sobolev space $H^s (\mathbb{R}^3)$, where $s$ ensures the
existence and uniqueness of classical solutions. A geometric decomposition of
the configuration space, identified by the orthogonality between the solution
$\mathbf{u}$ and the pressure forces $\nabla p$, splits the problem into two
simpler subproblems, which enable the uniform boundedness of the solution in
each component of the partition, thereby ensuring the extendability of the
solution.

AI.tldr: 通过几何分解将3D Navier-Stokes和Euler方程的解空间分解为两个子问题，证明了局部解的可延拓性
AI.motivation: 研究3D不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程和Euler方程在Sobolev空间H^s中局部解的可延拓性问题，这是流体力学中的核心开放问题
AI.techniques: 几何分解方法：基于解向量场u与压力梯度∇p的正交性对构型空间进行分解，将原问题拆分为两个更简单的子问题
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在分解后的每个分量中解的一致有界性，从而确保了局部解可以延拓到更大的时间区间
AI.significance: 为3D Navier-Stokes方程解的整体存在性问题提供了新的几何视角和分析框架，可能为解决这一千禧年难题提供新思路

title: Wave Decay with Singular Damping
summary:
We consider the stabilization problem on a manifold with boundary for a wave
equation with measure-valued linear damping. For a wide class of measures,
containing Dirac masses on hypersurfaces as well as measures with fractal
support, we establish an abstract energy decay result.

AI.tldr: 建立了带边界流形上具有测度值线性阻尼的波动方程能量衰减的抽象结果
AI.motivation: 研究带边界流形上具有测度值线性阻尼的波动方程的稳定化问题，这类阻尼包含超曲面上的Dirac质量测度和分形支撑集的测度
AI.techniques: 抽象能量衰减方法，处理测度值阻尼的分析技术，包含Dirac测度和分形测度的特殊处理
AI.main_theorems: 对于包含超曲面上Dirac质量和分形支撑集测度在内的广泛测度类，建立了抽象能量衰减结果
AI.significance: 扩展了波动方程阻尼理论到测度值阻尼情形，为具有奇异或分形阻尼的波动方程稳定化提供了理论框架

title: Vectorial Kato inequality for $p$-harmonic maps with optimal constant
summary:
We derive the sharp vectorial Kato inequality for $p$-harmonic mappings.
Surprisingly, the optimal constant differs from the one obtained for scalar
valued $p$-harmonic functions by Chang, Chen, and Wei. As an application we
demonstrate how this inequality can be used in the study of regularity of
$p$-harmonic maps. Furthermore, in the case of $p$-harmonic maps from $B^3$ to
$\mathbb{S}^3$, we enhance the known range of $p$ values for which regularity
is achieved. Specifically, we establish that for $p \in [2, 2.642]$, minimizing
$p$-harmonic maps must be regular.

AI.tldr: 建立了向量值p-调和映射的尖锐Kato不等式，其最优常数不同于标量情形，并应用于提升p-调和映射的正则性结果
AI.motivation: 研究向量值p-调和映射的Kato不等式，发现其最优常数与标量情形不同，这一发现对p-调和映射的正则性理论有重要意义
AI.techniques: 推导向量值p-调和映射的尖锐Kato不等式，利用该不等式分析p-调和映射的正则性，特别关注从B^3到S^3的情形
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了向量值p-调和映射的尖锐Kato不等式；2. 证明了对于p∈[2, 2.642]，从B^3到S^3的极小化p-调和映射必须是正则的
AI.significance: 该工作改进了p-调和映射的正则性理论，将已知的正则性p值范围扩展到[2, 2.642]，为向量值p-调和映射的分析提供了新工具

title: On the continuous properties for the 3D incompressible rotating Euler   equations
summary:
In this paper, we consider the Cauchy problem for the 3D Euler equations with
the Coriolis force in the whole space. We first establish the local-in-time
existence and uniqueness of solution to this system in $B^s_{p,r}(\R^3)$. Then
we prove that the Cauchy problem is ill-posed in two different sense: (1) the
solution of this system is not uniformly continuous dependence on the initial
data in the same Besov spaces, which extends the recent work of
Himonas-Misio{\l}ek \cite[Comm. Math. Phys., 296, 2010]{HM1} to the general
Besov spaces framework; (2) the solution of this system cannot be H\"{o}lder
continuous in time variable in the same Besov spaces. In particular, the
solution of the system is discontinuous in the weaker Besov spaces at time
zero. To the best of our knowledge, our work is the first one addressing the
issue on the failure of H\"{o}lder continuous in time of solution to the
classical Euler equations with(out) the Coriolis force.

AI.tldr: 研究了带科里奥利力的3D欧拉方程柯西问题在Besov空间中的适定性与不适定性
AI.motivation: 研究带科里奥利力的三维欧拉方程在Besov空间中的适定性问题，特别关注解对初值数据的连续依赖性和时间正则性
AI.techniques: Besov空间理论、局部存在唯一性证明、不适定性分析（非一致连续依赖性和时间Hölder连续性失效）
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在B^s_{p,r}(R^3)中建立局部存在唯一性；2. 证明解对初值数据不是一致连续的；3. 证明解在时间变量上不是Hölder连续的
AI.significance: 首次证明了带科里奥利力的欧拉方程解在Besov空间中时间Hölder连续性的失效，扩展了不适定性理论框架

title: Growth-fragmentation model for a population presenting heterogeneity in   growth rate: Malthus parameter and long-time behavior
summary:
The goal of the present paper is to explore the long-time behavior of the
growth-fragmentation equation formulated in the case of equal mitosis and
variability in growth rate, under fairly general assumptions on the
coefficients. The first results concern the monotonicity of the Malthus
parameter with respect to the coefficients. Existence of a solution to the
associated eigenproblem is then stated in the case of a finite set of growth
rates thanks to Kre\u{i}n-Rutman theorem and a series of estimates on moments.
Afterwards, adapting the classical general relative entropy (GRE) method
enables us to ensure uniqueness of the eigenelements and derive the long-time
asymptotics of the Cauchy problem. We prove convergence towards the steady
state including in the case of individual exponential growth known to exhibit
oscillations at large times in absence of variability. A few numerical
simulations are eventually performed in the case of linear growth rate to
illustrate our monotonicity results and the fact that variability, providing
enough mixing in the heterogeneous population, is sufficient to re-establish
asynchronicity.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了具有等分裂和生长速率变异性的生长-分裂方程的长时间行为，证明了变异性能消除振荡并恢复异步性。
AI.motivation: 研究生长-分裂方程的长时间渐近行为，特别关注等分裂情况下生长速率变异性对种群动态的影响。经典理论表明，在没有变异性的情况下，个体指数生长会导致大时间尺度上的振荡现象，本文旨在探索变异性如何影响这种动态。
AI.techniques: 使用Kre\u{i}n-Rutman定理处理特征问题，通过矩估计建立存在性，采用广义相对熵(GRE)方法证明唯一性和长时间渐近性，数值模拟验证理论结果。
AI.main_theorems: 1) Malthus参数关于系数的单调性结果；2) 有限生长速率集合下特征问题解的存在性；3) 特征元唯一性及Cauchy问题长时间渐近性；4) 证明即使在已知存在振荡的个体指数生长情况下，系统仍收敛到稳态。
AI.significance: 理论上阐明了生长速率变异性在种群动态中的关键作用，证明了变异性能够提供足够的混合效应，消除振荡并恢复异步性，为理解异质种群的长时间行为提供了新的数学框架。

title: Transmission problems and domain decompositions for non-autonomous   parabolic equations on evolving domains
summary:
Parabolic equations on evolving domains model a multitude of applications
including various industrial processes such as the molding of heated materials.
Such equations are numerically challenging as they require large-scale
computations and the usage of parallel hardware. Domain decomposition is a
common choice of numerical method for stationary domains, as it gives rise to
parallel discretizations. In this study, we introduce a variational framework
that extends the use of such methods to evolving domains. In particular, we
prove that transmission problems on evolving domains are well posed and
equivalent to the corresponding parabolic problems. This in turn implies that
the standard non-overlapping domain decompositions, including the Robin-Robin
method, become well defined approximations. Furthermore, we prove the
convergence of the Robin--Robin method. The framework is based on a
generalization of fractional Sobolev-Bochner spaces on evolving domains,
time-dependent Steklov-Poincar\'e operators, and elements of the approximation
theory for monotone maps.

AI.tldr: 提出变分框架将非重叠区域分解方法扩展到演化区域上的抛物方程，证明传输问题的适定性和Robin-Robin方法的收敛性。
AI.motivation: 演化区域上的抛物方程在工业过程（如加热材料成型）中有重要应用，但数值计算面临大规模并行计算的挑战，需要将适用于固定区域的区域分解方法扩展到演化区域。
AI.techniques: 演化区域上的分数阶Sobolev-Bochner空间推广、时间依赖的Steklov-Poincaré算子、单调映射逼近理论、变分框架构建。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 演化区域上传输问题的适定性；2) 传输问题与对应抛物问题的等价性；3) Robin-Robin方法作为标准非重叠区域分解的适定近似；4) Robin-Robin方法的收敛性证明。
AI.significance: 为演化区域抛物方程的并行数值计算提供理论基础，将固定区域分解方法成功扩展到演化情形，为工业应用中的大规模计算问题提供高效数值方法。

title: Corrigendum to "Spectral optimization for weighted anisotropic problems   with Robin conditions" [J. Differ. Equ. 378, 303--338, 2024]
comment: The manuscript is a corrigendum to arXiv:2303.01401
summary:
The goal of this note is to fill a gap in the proof of the first two items of
Theorem 5.1 in [4], which relies on Polya type inequalities and the
characterization of the equality cases for monotone rearrangements given in
Propositions 4.1 and 4.2 of [4], whose statements and proofs require some
adjustments.

AI.tldr: 填补了[4]中定理5.1前两项证明的漏洞，修正了单调重排等号情形特征化命题的陈述和证明
AI.motivation: 发现[4]中定理5.1前两项证明存在缺陷，特别是依赖于Polya型不等式和单调重排等号情形特征化的命题4.1和4.2需要修正
AI.techniques: Polya型不等式、单调重排理论、等号情形分析、证明修正技术
AI.main_theorems: 修正了[4]中命题4.1和4.2的陈述和证明，从而填补了定理5.1前两项证明的漏洞
AI.significance: 完善了相关理论框架的严谨性，确保了Polya型不等式和单调重排等号情形特征化结果的正确性

title: On the $\mathcal R$-boundedness of solution operators for a compressible   fluid model of Korteweg type in general domains
summary:
In this paper, we consider a resolvent problem arising from the free boundary
problem for the compressible fluid model of the Korteweg type, which is called
the Navier-Stokes-Korteweg system, with surface tension in general domains. The
Navier-Stokes-Korteweg system describes the liquid-vapor two-phase flow with
non-zero thickness phase boundaries, which is often called the diffuse
interface model. Our purpose is to show the solution operator families of the
resolvent problem are $\mathcal R$-bounded, which gives us the generation of
analytic semigroup and the maximal regularity in the $L_p$-in-time and
$L_q$-in-space setting by applying the Weis operator valued Fourier multiplier
theorem.

AI.tldr: 证明了Navier-Stokes-Korteweg系统在一般区域中具有表面张力时，其预解问题的解算子族是$\mathcal{R}$有界的
AI.motivation: 研究Korteweg型可压缩流体模型的自由边界问题，该系统描述具有非零厚度相界面的液-汽两相流（扩散界面模型），需要分析其预解问题的解算子性质
AI.techniques: 使用$\mathcal{R}$有界性理论、Weis算子值傅里叶乘子定理、$L_p$-时间$L_q$-空间框架下的极大正则性理论
AI.main_theorems: 证明了Navier-Stokes-Korteweg系统在一般区域中具有表面张力时，其预解问题的解算子族是$\mathcal{R}$有界的，从而得到解析半群的生成和极大正则性
AI.significance: 为Korteweg型可压缩流体模型的自由边界问题提供了严格的数学分析框架，建立了该系统的适定性理论，对两相流扩散界面模型的研究具有重要意义

title: Weak and very weak solutions of the Laplace equation and the Stokes   system with prescribed regularity
comment: 8 pages, 1 figure; submitted to Examples and Counterexamples
summary:
To verify theoretical results it is sometimes important to use a numerical
example where the solution has a particular regularity. The paper describes one
approach to construct such examples. It is based on the regularity theory for
elliptic boundary value problems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于椭圆边值问题正则性理论构造特定正则性数值算例的方法
AI.motivation: 在验证理论结果时，需要具有特定正则性的数值算例，但构造这样的算例存在困难
AI.techniques: 基于椭圆边值问题的正则性理论，利用解的正则性性质构造数值算例
AI.main_theorems: 提出了一种系统性的构造方法，能够生成具有预定正则性性质的数值算例
AI.significance: 为数值分析和理论验证提供了可靠的工具，有助于更准确地测试和验证偏微分方程数值方法

title: Steady bubbles and drops in inviscid fluids
summary:
We construct steady non-spherical bubbles and drops, which are traveling wave
solutions to the axisymmetric two-phase Euler equations with surface tension,
whose inner phase is a bounded connected domain. The solutions have a uniform
vorticity distribution in this inner phase and they have a vortex sheet on its
surface.
  Our construction relies on a perturbative approach around an explicit
spherical solution, given by Hill's vortex enclosed by a spherical vortex
sheet. The construction is sensitive to the Weber numbers describing the flow.
At critical Weber numbers, we perform a bifurcation analysis utilizing the
Crandall-Rabinowitz theorem in Sobolev spaces on the 2-sphere. Away from these
critical numbers, our construction relies on the implicit function theorem.
  Our results imply that the model containing surface tension is richer than
the ordinary one-phase Euler equations, in the sense that for the latter,
Hill's spherical vortex is unique (modulo translations) among all axisymmetric
simply connected uniform vortices of a given circulation.

AI.tldr: 构造了具有表面张力的轴对称两相欧拉方程的稳态非球形气泡和液滴解，这些解具有均匀涡量分布和表面涡层。
AI.motivation: 研究具有表面张力的两相流中的稳态非球形气泡和液滴，扩展Hill球形涡的唯一性结果，探索表面张力如何丰富流动模式。
AI.techniques: 采用扰动方法围绕Hill球形涡解展开，在临界Weber数处使用Crandall-Rabinowitz定理进行分岔分析，在非临界处使用隐函数定理，在2-球面上的Sobolev空间中工作。
AI.main_theorems: 构造了轴对称两相欧拉方程的稳态非球形气泡和液滴解，证明在临界Weber数处存在分岔解，在非临界Weber数处存在连续族解，表明含表面张力模型比单相欧拉方程更丰富。
AI.significance: 首次系统构造了具有表面张力的两相流中的非球形稳态解，揭示了表面张力在气泡和液滴形态形成中的关键作用，为多相流理论提供了新的数学框架。

title: Global dissipative solutions of the 3D Naiver-Stokes and MHD equations
summary:
For any divergence free initial data in $H^\frac12$, we prove the existence
of infinitely many dissipative solutions to both the 3D Navier-Stokes and MHD
equations, whose energy profiles are continuous and decreasing on $[0,\infty)$.
If the initial data is only $L^2$, our construction yields infinitely many
solutions with continuous energy, but not necessarily decreasing. Our theorem
does not hold in the case of zero viscosity as this would violate the
weak-strong uniqueness principle due to Lions. This was achieved by designing a
convex integration scheme that takes advantage of the dissipative term.

AI.tldr: 证明了3D Navier-Stokes和MHD方程在任意散度自由初值下存在无穷多耗散解，其能量剖面连续递减
AI.motivation: 研究三维Navier-Stokes和MHD方程解的唯一性问题，特别是对于低正则性初值（H^{1/2}或L^2），探索是否存在无穷多耗散解，这与弱强唯一性原理形成对比
AI.techniques: 设计了一种凸积分方案，特别利用了耗散项的优势，构造了满足能量递减条件的解
AI.main_theorems: 对于任意散度自由H^{1/2}初值，证明存在无穷多能量连续递减的耗散解；对于L^2初值，存在无穷多能量连续但不一定递减的解；该结果在零粘性情况下不成立
AI.significance: 揭示了Navier-Stokes和MHD方程在低正则性初值下解的非唯一性，挑战了传统唯一性认知，为理解流体方程解的结构提供了新视角
